name: The Last Night
short_description: "The Last Night™" is a horror point and click game, mixing 2D and 3D with a very particular pixel art style. Will you be able to make the right choices ?
detailed_description:
"The Last Night™" is a horror point and click game, mixing 2D and 3D with a very particular style.

Mark Castle , a former police officer, is the pawn of an experimental experiment on the treatment of phobias. Having lost most of his memories, Mark will fight against many fears, in order to solve the puzzle and get out of the simulation in which he is immersed. Will he be able to overcome his fears? Or will he die from his demons? His fate is in your hands.

Let yourself be frightened by simple pixels.

This first chapter introduces a very first phobia that you discover during the adventure.

Will you be able to make the right choices ?
